case_title: THE WONG FAMILY TRUST VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION AND
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: POS OF DECLARATION, EXHIBIT 1, EXHIBIT 2, PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER THE WONG FAMILY TRUST
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-01-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, RESPONDENT RENT BOARD'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. LIANG V. SAN FRANCISCO RENT BOARD 124 CA4 775.778 ON POINT. ALSO 90 DAYS HAVE ELAPSED PER CCP 1094.6(B) AND CCP 389(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON THE SAME DAY AND TIME. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABLIZATION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION will be heard in Department 501 on the same day and time. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Respondent Rent Board'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Wayne K. Snodgrass (415-554-4675) appearing for repondent San Francisco Rent Board. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted, Respondent Rent Board'S Demurrer To Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is Sustained without leave to amend. Liang v. San Francisco Rent Board 124 CA4 775.778 on point. Also 90 days have elapsed per CCP 1094.6(b) and ccp 389(b). Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
